_comment: Runnable (system-1) conformance spec for ai-rec-backtest-orders, the standalone canonical form interface_conformance.py executes ({method,path,path_params,query,body,required}). INTERFACE_CONTRACT.md '## Conformance spec' REFERENCES this file (standalone convention; mirrors conformance/byo-ai-key.json; system-12). THIS FEATURE'S WIRE DELTA IS TINY AND PURELY ADDITIVE: orders are CLIENT-LOCAL (no order endpoints, nothing to sweep); the only surfaces are (1) the rec POST gaining the optional scenario_id selector + scenario provenance and (2) the status GET gaining the always-present scenarios advertisement. ONLY the status GET is asserted here: it is anonymous-readable, side-effect-free, and its additive shape is environment-INDEPENDENT (scenarios.enabled is boolean either way; catalog is [] under the default AI_REC_SCENARIOS_ENABLED=off, populated when an operator flips it ON — the [] fan-out type-checks entries in either case). THE POST BRANCHES (scenario_unavailable refusal when OFF, scenario_error, fault passthrough, scenario provenance, keyless/meter-bypass, determinism, auth-outermost 403) ARE INTENTIONALLY OMITTED: the POST is auth-gated (anonymous => 403) and flag/env-dependent — verified by the BACKEND runtime-proof block + the FRONTEND test matrix, exactly like the byo-ai-key precedent. HARD negative invariants enforced by tests, not a positive field here: a scenario-selecting request never reaches a paid LLM and never 5xxs; no reason string carries secrets; no response carries order data. Uses SPY (fetch once first: curl http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/ticker/SPY). Boot: npx nx serve api (uvicorn :8000).

endpoints._note: GET status keeps the shipped availability/gate/cap shape UNCHANGED (additivity) and ALWAYS carries the new scenarios object: enabled boolean + catalog array. Under the default flag-OFF env the catalog MUST be [] (no enumeration while disabled — D1); the catalog[].id/name assertions fan out per element, so they pass vacuously when empty and type-enforce entries when an operator runs this sweep with AI_REC_SCENARIOS_ENABLED=true.
